title: Study Shows Women Have Happier Relationships When Their Partners Aren’t Massive Douchebags
description: Think that your girlfriend likes it when you promise you’ll pick her up from the dentist, but then forget because you’re playing Call of Duty?

title: Here’s What Happened When I Stopped Drinking Coffee in the Morning and Replaced it with Just Different Coffee
description: Sometimes it feels like coffee runs your life. I used to need my morning cup of Joe so badly I couldn’t get out of bed without one. That’s when I knew I needed to cut it out of my life!

title: The Best Bars for Singles to Find James Kissing His New Girlfriend
description: What better way to get over a recent breakup and look for that someone new than by exploring New York City’s rich and vibrant nightlife! You won’t find love in any of these hotspots for social singles, but you sure will be able to find James locking lips with his newer and younger girlfriend.

title: How to Pretend You Didn’t Know Andy Would be at His Own Party
description: Andy is throwing himself a party in honor of his birthday. And while you desperately want this party to finally be the moment Andy looks deep into your eyes and realizes how much he loves you, you also don’t want to come off looking like a loser who likes him and came just to see him.

title: The Daily Itinerary of a Gen Z Blogger in 2026 Pretending to Live Like a Millennial in 2016
description: Normally, I start my day with cold brew, but since I’m living like a millennial, I start my day with cold brew, because cold brew was all the rage in 2016!

title: How to Humor: Giving Other Writers Notes Like a Champ Pt. 2
description: If you’re giving out your opinion, own it!

title: Robin Sloan's Lab
description: Experiments in writing and technology from a novelist.
